reference: Hello. If the lump is near the center, it is likely that there has been bleeding in the goiter. An ultrasonography will clarify the diagnosis better. I believe that at the age of sixty, such swellings should be taken seriously. Under sonography guidance, fine-needle aspiration cytology can be performed to obtain a tissue diagnosis, so that further management can be planned effectively.
text: Hello. If the lump is near the center, it is likely that there has been bleeding in the goiter. An ultrasonography will clarify the diagnosis better. I believe that at the age of 60, such swellings should be taken seriously. Under sonography guidance, fine needle aspiration psychology can be performed to obtain a tissue diagnosis so that further management can be planned effectively.
